content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from slovenian to english:
Elektroenergetsko podjetje Hokuriku je poročalo, da zaradi potresa ni bilo škode in da so v jedrski elektrarni Sika ustavili delovanje reaktorjev številka 1 in 2.
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

As a linguistic expert, I am happy to assist you with this translation. Here is the English version of the sentence:

### Hokuriku Electric Power Company reported that there was no damage due to the earthquake and that they have shut down reactors number 1 and 2 at the Shika nuclear power plant. ###
